title: Lucille Named
description: This resource pack replaces Minecraft's Wooden Sword with Negan's bat, Lucille from TWD after renaming a Wooden Sword.
body:
This resource pack replaces Minecraft's Wooden Sword with Negan's bat, Lucille from TWD.

This version only replaces the texture when you rename your Wooden Sword as "Lucille" using an anvil.

There is another Resource Pack that just changes the Wooden Sword's texture. ([Link](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lucille))

![Negan holding Lucille](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CvnIjshV/images/09738103d8b680fb94de588fccb7177fb1e665c7.png)

![Lucille shining](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CvnIjshV/images/eb866834f84e3d1ea4a6c6e3c65ce2e04ae173c4.png)
